titleStmt.title: SII 41.465: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 465. (A.R. No. 679 of 1905.) Tiruvēḍagam, Nilakkōṭṭai Taluk, Madura District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Patrikāparamēśvara temple at Tiruvēḍagam.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Māravarman Sundara I, Year 7 = 1222 A.D.

summary.p: Built in the middle. This is an order of the king reducing the tax rates, in king as well as money on different crops that were being paid by the chaṭṭar (brāhmaṇas) of Chōḻakulāntakachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Pāgaṉūr-kūṟṟam as they were feeling the existing rates as heavy (ataippu). The king took this action at the request of his elder sister (akkaṉ). The new rates are specified for various crops (paddy, tiṉai, varagu, eḷ, pul, iṟuṅgu) and cropping seasons (like perum-pū, aiṟpachikuṟuvai). The rate for pāḍikāval (watchmanship) is also given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmalarttiruvum poruceyamaṭantaiyun tāmaraik kuvimulaiccerpuyattiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷi taṭṭāmaraikkātal mātukavin peṟattiḷaippa veṇṭicai ntarumamum taḻaippa Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭi Iṭaṉ(t)toṟumeṭuppak karuṅkalikaṉalkeṭa kaṭavuḷ vetiyar nantoḻil veḷvicceṅkaṉal vaḷaṟpaccurutiyuntamuḻum tolviḷaṅkulavap porutiṟavāḻi pūtalañcūḻ Orukai Irucevi mummataṉāṟ koṭṭu ^1^
yitayilakoṟṟat teṇṭicaiyāṉai Eruttameṟikkaṇṭa ṉāṭemateṉakkayal ka ḻikūrak kocalan tuḷuvaṅku kiraṅkuccaram pocalamāḷuvar makatar poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅkaliṅkamiḻaṅ kaṭāraṅkauṭaṉ te puṉaiventaṟ korutaṉi nāyakaṉeṉṟulaketta tirumuṭicūṭic ceṅkolocci koṟṟattāḷk kuḷirkuṭai niḻaṟkiṭkaṟṟaikkavari kāvalar vicaviraik katirnavamaṇi virasimhāsaṉattuṭaṉ muṭicūṭiyuyar kulattiruveṉappaṅkaya malaṟkaṟaṅ kuvittuppāttivar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ cen
mauli meliṭac civanta Iṇaimalaṟciṟaṭik kamalam karaṅkamalameṉṟaṇukumulaka muḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutalmatikkulam viḷakkiya komutaṟkomāṟavarmmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīsundapāṇdhayadevaṟku npu Iṟuttu vanta Iṟai Aḷave Āṇṭoṉṟu muṉpu Iṟutta Iṟai tavirntu Ikkūṟṟattuc coḻakulānta caturvvedimaṅkalam Iṟukkum paṭiyilē Ittiruveṭakam vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nilamaḷantu payirpārttu viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum nelluppa
yokam tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu mukkalamum perumpūkkuṟuvaiyu mācikkuṟuvaiyum viḷaintanilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟu pātiyum tulā Iṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟukālum Āṭikkuṟuvai viṉiyokam tiramam mukkāle Orumāvum nellu Irukalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiyum Aiṟpacikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu Araiye mākāṇiyāka maṭakkiṉa nilattukku perumpūvaricaiyum tiṉaiyum varakum Eḷḷum pullum Iṟuṅkum viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam muṉṟekālum toṭṭakkūṟu
mmuṭi pāṭikāval pāṭakattāl nellu Irutūṇiyum Āka nālāvatiṉetir muvāmāṇṭu mutal Iṟaikaṭṭi Iṟukkaveṇum Eṉṟu Akkaṉ namakku Aruḷicceytamaiyil Ittiruveṭakam muṉpu Iṟuttu vanta Iṟai Ataippup paṭiyile Ittiruveṭakam vikkaramapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nilam Aḷantu payirpārttu viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum nelluppaṉṉirukalamum viṉiyokam tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu mukkalamum perumpūk kuṟuvaiyum mācikkuṟuvaiyum Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟupāti
veṭakam ku perumpūvaricaiyum tiṉaiyum varakum Eḷḷum pullum Iṟuṅkum viḷaintanilattukkum māttāl tiramam muṉṟēkālum toṭṭakkaṭamai nilaviraṭṭiyum pāṭikāval pāṭakattāl nellu Irutūṇiyum Āka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Iṟuppatāka Iṭukaveṉṟu Ippaṭi candrādittyavaṟ Iṟai celvatāka
lum veṭṭivittukkoḷka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉa paṭikku Ivai viḻuppādhirājan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cokkanāyakaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivaivāṇādhirājan Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ṉ pākaṉūṟkūṟṟattut tiruveṭakattuc caṭṭarkaḷukku taṅkaḷur kaṭamai Iṟuttup potukiṟapaṭi Ataippuṇṭeṉṟum nālāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu coḻakulāntakaccaturvvetimaṅkalam Iṟutta paṭiyile vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nilamaḷantu payirpārttu
viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum nellup paṉṉirukalamum viṉiyokam tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu mukkalamum perumpūkkuṟuvaiyum mācikkuṟuvaiyum viḷaintanilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟu
kalaṉe Irutūṇikkuṟuṇiyum viṉiyokam tiramam mukkāle Orumāvum nellu Irukalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiyum Aṟpacikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilam Oṉṟu Araiye mākāṇiyāka maṭakkiṉa nilattukkum perumpūvaricaiyum tiṉaiyum varakum Eḷḷum pullum Iṟuṅkum viḷainta nila
ttukku māttāl tiramam muṉṟekālum toṭṭakkaṭamai nilaviraṭṭiyum pāṭikāval pāṭakattāl nellu Irutūṇiyum Āk(ā) nālāvatiṉetir muvāmāṇṭu mutal Iṟukkaveṇumeṉṟum Akkaṉ Aruḷicceytamaiyil m Aḷantupayir pārttu viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum nelluppaṉṉirukalamum viṉiyokam tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu mukkalamum perumpūkkuṟuvaiyum mācikkuṟuvaiyum viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyul Oṉṟu pātiyum tulā Iṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku O
ṉṟu kālum Āṭikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukkut tiramam Oṉṟaraiyum nellu Aiṅkalaṉe Iru tūṇikkuṟuṇiyum viṉiyokam tiramam mukkāle Orumāvum nellu Irukalaṉemuk kuṟuṇiyum Aṟpacikkuṟuvai viḷainta nila pullum Iṟuṅkum viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam muṉṟekālum toṭṭakkaṭamai nilaviraṭṭiyum pāṭikāval pāṭakattāl nellu Irutūṇiyum Āka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Ippaṭi Iṟuppatāka niṉaippiṭac coṉṉom Ippaṭi candrādim veṭṭivittuk koḷ
ka Ivai Aṇṭanāṭṭup perumaṇalūr Arayaṉ kulacekaratevaṉāṉa kulacekara Uttaramantiri Eḻuttu . yāṇṭu 4 vatunāḷ 1000 9 100 10 8 Ivai neṟcūranāṭṭu meṉocciyāṉa taraṇiviccātiranallūr nampiuṭaiyanāyakaṉāṉa koṅkarājan ṉa vikkirama pāṇṭiya toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu ... § Aruḷicceyal pākaṉūr(ṟ) kūṟṟattu tiruveṭakattuc caṭṭarkaḷukku Ivvūr muṉpu Iṟuttupponta Iṟai Ataippuṇṭeṉṟum muṉpu Iṟutta Iṟai tavirttu Ikkūṟṟattuc coḻakulāntakac caturvedimaṅkalam Iṟukkumpaṭiyile Ittiruveṭakam
vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nilaaḷantu payirpārttu viḷainta nilattu (viḷaintanila)ttukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum nelluppaṉṉirukalamum viṉiyokam tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu mukkalamum perumpūkkuṟuvaiyum tukku Oṉṟukālum Āṭikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku tiramam Oṉṟaraiyum nellu Aiṅkalaṉe Irutūṇik kuṟuṇiyum viṉiyokam tiramam mukkāle Orumāvum nellu Irukalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiyum Aṟpacikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu Araiyē mākāṇiyāka maṭakkiṉa nilattukkum perumpūva
ricaiyum tiṉaiyum varakum Eḷḷum pullum Iṟuṅkum viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam muṉṟē kālum toṭṭakaṭamai nila Iraṭṭiyum pāṭikāval pāṭakattum peṟṟa Irutūṇiyum Āka nālāvatiṉetir muṉṟāvatu paṭi candrādityavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷka veṉṟu perumāṉ tirumukamappaṭiyile candrādittyavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittu koḷḷa Ivai vikkira
mapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉeḻuttu § Aruḷāl Iśśilālekhai paṇṇiṉeṉ Innāyaṉār kovil śilappā Ācāriyaṉ ciyaṉāṇṭāṉāṉa coḻakulāntaka Ācāriyaṉeḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 41.465 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
